title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Samsung R&D India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Samsung R&D India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Samsung R&D India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Samsung R&D India:
Samsung R&D India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung R&D India!
